title: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
purpose: To raise the profile of global malnutrition in Parliament and champion solutions to end it, to strengthen cross-party parliamentary support for UK investment in nutrition and food security, and to support and challenge the UK government to maintain their leadership on global nutrition and food security.
secretariat: United Against Malnutrition and Hunger acts as the group's secretariat.https://uamh.uk/

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
payments.summary: International visit to Tanzania between 21 June 2025 and 27 June 2025 — To attend the Agriculture, Nutrition and Health (ANH) Academy Week Conference in Dar es Salaam, to see the impact of UK overseas development in treating and preventing malnutrition in Tanzania and Zanzibar, and to understand the work of national and regional government, scientists, health workers, humanitarian organisations, charities, civil society, local businesses, and local communities in tackling malnutrition.
payments.description: Flights (£1,790), accommodation (£810), travel medication (£76), food, visa, transport and in-country expenses (£365)

payments.description: Flights (£1,130), accommodation (£810), travel medication (£47.99), food, visa, transport and in-country expenses (£373.85)

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development
payments.summary: International visit to France between 26 March 2025 and 28 March 2025 — Travelled as Co-Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group on Nutrition for Development to attend the 2025 Paris Nutrition for Growth Summit as one of the two official UK Parliamentary delegates.
payments.description:
Total value: £1,025 (plus any additional, individual expenses incurred)
Travel – £300
Accommodation – £530
Food and in-country expenses – £195
